raw_text: Strand-specific RNA-seq reads from control siRNA treatment, and each hnRNP depletion experiment were processed as previously described (Polymenidou et al., 2011). An average of 70% of reads mapped uniquely to our gene structure database, using Bowtie (version 0.12.2, with parameters âl 20 âm 5 âk 5 ââbest ââun ââ max âq).
